reviews.review_description: Pleasantly suprised with the rock and rap songs about shooting ducks lol. My current two favorites might be "every duck is a tragedy" and "I wish I could fly" which is a rap song from the dog's perspective. Great game. I remember it being free (I think) but happy to pay the $4 for the upgrades and the music.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much Hugh Wang for this review — it truly means a lot, especially coming from a player who experienced the very first version of the game.

It’s been an incredible journey, and the game has evolved so much over time. The community has grown a lot too, with thousands of players joining us along the way. There are now more than 200 songs in the game, and even more are coming soon.

I love the two tracks you mentioned as well — great taste! I actually edited the latest YouTube video about the game’s creation using “Every Duck Is a Tragedy,” so that’s an excellent choice.

More crazy updates are on the way — I’m not letting any of you down. Thank you again, and thanks to everyone who keeps Virtual Duck Hunt alive. This is truly a shared adventure.

reviews.review_description:
Where to start!
There are quite a few Duck Hunt games out there, some more realistic and some less,but this one for me hits the spot perfectly. The music throws you back in time,and  the dog and the oversized bullets are fun to experience for yourself. The leaderboard is filled with people who have scores i can only dream of but i still try to do so (and fail lol) but it doesn't feel like a failure because fun is the focus,and leaderboards are a part of it!  If you want to know more about it, i have a video review on my Youtube channel which you can watch,to learn  more. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HHBMlKOguvQ
and don't forget to check it out for yourself to experience how amazing the game is.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, Qcount! 😄

“What year is it?” might be one of the bests ways anyone has ever described the vibe of the game — I absolutely love that! That nostalgic feeling mixed with a bit of madness is exactly what I was aiming for.

I’m really glad you’re enjoying the music, the dog (yes… he is a bit crazy 😅) And honestly, the leaderboard is there to challenge yourself, but like you said — fun always comes first. 

Also, a huge thank you for taking the time to make a video review and share it with your community.

See you on the leaderboard… maybe one day we’ll both reach those impossible scores! 😉

Fred – Bifimmersive Games 🦆🎯

reviews.review_description: Love it!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, Lisafgee! 🦆💛
Really happy you’re enjoying Virtual Duck Hunt! More fun updates are on the way 🎯

reviews.review_description: This game is a solid experience from start to finish. The graphics, gameplay mechanics, and overall immersion really stand out. Whether you’re new to VR or experienced, it’s easy to jump in and enjoy. Definitely one of those titles that keeps you coming back for more. Highly recommend checking it out—especially if you’re looking for something fun and engaging.

developer_response.body:
Thanks Antonio !!!

Reading this truly means a lot to me. You’ve been here since the very early days of Virtual Duck Hunt, testing, supporting, and sticking with the game as it evolved 

Guys like you are a huge part of why I keep improving and expanding the experience.

Thank you for your trust, your time, and your continued support. 

See you back in the hunt 🦆💛

reviews.review_description: This game is a great version of an old classic and is highly entertaining. I have always liked playing Duck Hunt and this game allows you to do that in a new environment with a more realistic dog and has more content than the original, and is fun to play!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much, Jeff! 😊 I really tried to pack in as much fun as possible, and it’s great to hear you’re enjoying it. I’m still adding more features and surprises, so there’s plenty more to come—and I can’t wait for you to try them! 🦆🎯

reviews.review_description: This is an awesome remake of the classic duck hunt, i sat and played for an hour straight, it was a staple in my childhood when I used to play with my grandmother for hours and this brought back so many good memories of that, gameplay is really fun and i would recommend this to any fans of the retro game.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this beautiful review ❤️

Reading this truly means a lot to me. Bringing back nostalgic memories is exactly why I created this game. Knowing it reminded you of the hours you spent playing with your grandmother genuinely touched me.

I’m really happy you enjoyed the gameplay and could lose yourself in it for a while. Moments like this make all the time and effort worth it.

Thank you for playing, for sharing your memories, and for recommending the game to other retro fans — it means more than you know 🦆🙏

reviews.review_description: Loved Duck hunt as a kid and with the new graphics and music this is a must play! Thanks Devs. As far as the 1star people most had a controller issue that is addressed in other reviews.

developer_response.body:
A huuuuge thank Apeanick for this amazing review — it truly means a lot! 🙏

I’ll keep improving and evolving the game thanks to players like you. Your support really motivates me to push things further.

And yes, the controller connection issue some players experienced was fixed quite a while ago. I probably should take the time to reach out to them one by one and let them know they can jump back in — even if they were only a few. The game has evolved a lot since then, and every single player truly matters to me.

The community is growing every day, and it’s always a real pleasure to chat with you all whenever I can.

Thanks again for being part of the adventure! 🎯

reviews.review_description: A great version of my childhood favorite classic! simple, fun, and with fantastic music! It brought back memories of Sunday afternoons at my cousins' house! A must-have for anyone feeling nostalgic!

developer_response.body: Wow, thank you so much Sugar for your amazing review! I really loved chatting with you about the game on Discord—it made me super happy. I’m thrilled it brought back such great memories! Let’s definitely keep in touch, and happy duck music hunting!

reviews.review_description: The first time you play it is a little hard but if you play a lot you will be able to get better and the songs are the best especially the one called rage in my lungs

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much Wabbit for taking the time to write this review

I’m really happy you’re enjoying the game! And yes… “Rage in My Lungs” is one of my personal favorites too 😄🔥 Great choice!

There are actually more than 200 different songs in the game, so you’re definitely not done being surprised yet. I’m even thinking about adding a feature to let players create their own favorite playlist… 😉

Thanks again for your support — it really means a lot! 🦆🎶

reviews.review_description: Fun time shooting ducks and brings back childhood memories.

developer_response.body:
Thank you! I'm really happy that you're enjoying the game so much.
And thanks as well for helping the game reach more players out there — your support really means a lot. Wishing you all the best!

reviews.review_title: 🦆 A Nostalgic Classic Reborn in VR
reviews.review_description:
Virtual Duck Hunt is a superb treat for nostalgic gamers who grew up with the NES zapper era. It faithfully brings back the classic rules and feel—this time fully realized in VR—and it works beautifully.

The lobby alone is hilarious and full of quirky charm, instantly setting the tone. Beyond nostalgia, the game also innovates with new features, keeping the experience fresh rather than just relying on memories.

The affordable price point makes it easy for anyone to jump in and give it a try, which is a big plus. Reliving these childhood moments in VR is an absolute joy, and it’s fantastic to be able to experience a classic like this in a whole new way.

I truly hope the studio expands this concept with more retro-inspired titles from the Sega or Nintendo era.
What a blast—pure fun and nostalgia done right. 🎮✨

developer_response.body:
Hi Metaquesta99. Wow, thank you so much for this amazing review! 
It truly means a lot to read this.  Recreating that feeling in VR while still bringing something fresh was exactly the goal, so your words really hit home.

 Knowing that the game brings back childhood memories while still feeling fun and modern in VR is the best reward I could ask for.

Thank you for the support and encouragement. And who knows… more retro-inspired VR experiences might come in the future 😉

And regarding the price, the main goal is to share the game as widely as possible because I love doing that. Community feedback is worth its weight in gold.

See you on the leaderboard, and happy hunting!

reviews.review_title: Hold My Drink! I Got Some Ducks To Shoot
reviews.review_description:
Really Enjoyed This Trip Down Memory lane playing Duck Hunt but in VR with it's own twist.  2 ducks at a time for 10 ducks each round and then every few rounds.... BONUS ROUND!!!! Where you shoot a lot of ducks at once!  Enjoy the music where you can turn the radio on or off and try to get your score on the leaderboard!!!!

Any issues in the game and Dev has been on top of it!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the review! 🦆❤️
It’s honestly amazing to see the game evolve continuously thanks to player feedback and community discussions.
Without the players, there simply wouldn’t be a game — this is very much a shared adventure.

It’s been a real pleasure to build and improve Virtual Duck Hunt, and the game will definitely keep evolving quickly.
I’m never short on ideas thanks to the community 😉

What’s been especially exciting lately is seeing how crazy the scores are getting — players are seriously pushing the limits, and the competition is real! The enthusiasm and demand from the community are incredibly motivating.

Thanks again for being part of the journey, and see you on the hunt! 🎯🦆

reviews.review_description:
Virtual Duck Hunt VR on Meta Quest is a brilliant mix of nostalgia and modern VR fun, turning the classic arcade-style shooter into an immersive, room-scale experience that’s easy to pick up and hard to put down.

From the moment you load in, the game nails that old-school duck hunt vibe while fully embracing VR. Physically aiming your weapon, tracking fast-moving ducks, and reacting in real time makes every round feel active and engaging. It’s simple in concept, but incredibly satisfying when you start chaining accurate shots and improving your reaction speed.

Visually, the game keeps things clean and colourful, which works perfectly in VR. The environments are clear, performance is smooth, and everything is designed to keep your focus on the action without visual clutter. The sound effects and feedback also do a great job of rewarding good aim and quick reflexes.

Where Virtual Duck Hunt VR really shines is accessibility. Anyone can jump in and understand it instantly, making it a great party game or a fun way to introduce newcomers to VR. At the same time, chasing high scores and faster clears gives experienced players plenty of reason to come back for “just one more round.”

Pros:
	•	Fun, nostalgic arcade-style gameplay in full VR
	•	Easy to learn, hard to master
	•	Great physical aiming and immersion
	•	Perfect for short, replayable sessions

Cons:
	•	Limited depth if you’re looking for a long story-driven experience

So in short…Virtual Duck Hunt VR is pure, no-nonsense VR fun. It knows exactly what it wants to be and delivers it well! fast, addictive, and perfect for quick play sessions or showing off VR to friends. If you enjoy classic shooters or casual competitive fun on Meta Quest, this one is well worth checking out. And very cheap 😉🏆

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this — it truly means a lot to me. 🙏
Virtual Duck Hunt is really a passion project, something I wanted to share with as many people as possible. That’s why I’ve kept it very affordable and as simple and accessible as I can.
My goal was always to make VR easy to enjoy for everyone: young or old, standing or seated, playable with one hand, one button — just jump in and have fun.
My dad, who’s almost 70, is actually one of the game’s biggest fans… so I guess mission accomplished 😄
Thanks again for the support and for taking the time to write such a thoughtful review. It really motivates me to keep improving the game. 🦆❤️

reviews.review_description: Had a great time playing this remake of the classic arcade game Duck Hunt.  It's still in development so every now and then you will hit a glitch, bit still worth playing.   Can't wait to see what improvements they make. UPDATE: They recently did an update that really added to the game. Better graphics, better actions.  This game is really worth your time if you ever played Duck hunt on Nintendo or other locations.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much Jeff for your kind message! I’m really happy you enjoyed the remake.
The game is still growing, and every update is made thanks to players like you who support it and share their feedback.

I’m glad you noticed the improvements — many more are already on the way!

reviews.review_title: A Fab Nostalgic Blast with a VR Twist
reviews.review_description:
If you grew up playing the classic Duck Hunt on the old-school game sytems, then this is an absolute must-play. It perfectly captures the charm and simplicity of the 1980s original, but elevates it in a way that only VR can.
You’re hit with a wave of nostalgia in a familiar setting and it has that addictive “just one more round” feeling. But now, instead of sitting on a sofa with a light gun, you’re fully immersed, tracking ducks and reacting in real time with your trusty dog
A  retro vibe without feeling dated and at a great price point makes it one to go for.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this amazing review! 😊

I’m really happy you felt that nostalgic vibe — that was exactly the goal, bringing back those classic 80's memories while adding the immersion that only VR can offer.

The “just one more round” feeling is the best compliment I could hope for.

I’ll keep improving the game over time, and feedback like yours really means a lot. Thanks again for your support! 🎯🦆

reviews.review_description: Truly reminds me of the old school version but better! 10/10 recommend for kids && adults 😊

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much Marie ! 😊

That’s actually exactly why I created Virtual Duck Hunt — to bring back the feeling and nostalgia of the old-school classic while adding more fun, humor, music, and many more surprises to come, so younger players can discover that same magic too.

Rediscovering — and helping a new generation discover — this classic in full VR immersion is honestly what touches the most players, and comments like yours truly mean a lot to me.

Thank you again for taking the time to leave a review, and have fun playing Virtual Duck Hunt! More surprises are coming very soon! 🦆🎯

reviews.review_description: Tried this game today and loved it , hope to see more updates in the future 😁

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much BrainWash99 for the review 😄🙏 And officially… congratulations on being the 100th review for Virtual Duck Hunt!! 🎉🏆

That’s such an important symbolic milestone for the game, but also a very concrete motivation to keep adding more and more content. The community keeps coming up with amazing ideas and suggestions, and I can promise you one thing: we are far from done having fun with this game 😁

Actually, reaching this 100 review milestone already gave me a new idea that I’m planning to include in a future update 👀 So keep an eye on the game… reviews themselves might somehow find their way into it haha.

At the end of the day, it really feels like the players are creating the game alongside me. I’m just the instrument bringing those ideas to life 🎯🦆

Thank you infinitely for being part of this adventure ❤️

reviews.review_description: Brings me back to the old days great game

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much 😄🙏

Bringing back those old feelings was exactly one of the main goals of Virtual Duck Hunt 🦆🎯

I grew up with those classic games too, so recreating that atmosphere in VR with new details, music, surprises and community features has been an amazing adventure for me.

Seeing players reconnect with those “old days” through the game is really special ❤️

I hope you keep having a blast with it, and there’s definitely more fun and surprises coming 👀🔥

reviews.review_description: Game is cool. The dog is old so don’t expect much from him or her! Lol

developer_response.body:
Haha I couldn’t have said it better myself! 😄
The dog actually turns 42 years old today — the original game came out on April 21, 1984!

So yeah… that explains the slow moves, the slight madness… and maybe a bit of laziness too 😂

Perfect timing for your review — couldn’t have landed any better. Thanks a lot Dave for playing and sharing this!

reviews.review_description: Great relaxing fun game to sit on the sofa and blast away

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot! That’s exactly what I aimed for: a very simple game to play, no space needed, seated or standing, one button, and pure arcade fun. You perfectly captured the essence of the game. Welcome — and more updates are coming soon 😉

reviews.review_description:
Ok nice game! Fun for me.
The dog is crazy

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot! 😄 Glad you're having fun! And yeah… the dog is totally crazy 😅

reviews.review_description: Virtual Duck Hunt brings the classic arcade duck shooting experience into VR with intuitive rifle controls, colorful visuals and fast-paced action. It’s easy to learn, fun to play and perfect for quick sessions on Meta Quest headsets.

developer_response.body:
Huge thanks, Majerik!! 
So happy you’re enjoying Virtual Duck Hunt! The game is still evolving and I’ve got more updates and fun stuff coming. Thanks a ton for the support!

reviews.review_description:
I got a key from FB GA.
I did not have Nintendo, but I played duck hunt in arcade room when I was a boy.
The bullet is changed like a slow rocket and the idea is good to play not so seriously. This simple but not easy game to reach higher level makes me fun.

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for this review.
I’m really happy that you won the game and had the chance to discover it. You perfectly understood the nostalgic spirit in which I created it.

I also played this game when I was a kid, and it was pure nostalgia that pushed me to recreate it. I had so much fun playing my own game that it made me want to share it with as many people as possible and keep improving it over time.

Today, the game reaches all kinds of players, even those who never experienced the original one. The competition is fun, and I’ll continue to make sure the game stays accessible to everyone.

Have fun — you’ll probably climb the leaderboard very quickly! 😄

reviews.review_description: Omg...back to when I was playing with my Nintendo....but in VR. I love this game for his pixel style and gameplay...simple and immediate ...but also immersive because now in VR. We need more games like this!!!

developer_response.body: Thanks you so much for this kind review !  That’s exactly the VR vibe I wanted. Simple, fun, immersive – and there’s more to come! 🦆🎮

reviews.review_description: I have such great memories of playing Duck Hunt on the original NES. The last gift I ever got from my Grandmother (who was the one who first introduced me to gaming on her original NES and Sega Genesis) was Duck Hunt for an updated NES system but you can't play it on newer TVs. This is seriously the closest I've seen anything come to it on any system. It's amazing, thank you!

developer_response.body: I’m honored that this version could come close to recreating that feeling for you. Thank you for sharing this — it’s messages like yours that make it all worthwhile! 🦆✨🎮

reviews.review_description:
This game brings back many memories of shooting ducks on the NES with the light gun. I like how the developer kept the feel of the original but updated it enough to fit the technology of VR. The ducks are cute to shoot and the bullets seem to go where I was aiming. Just like the original game, this game is simple and to the point. Shoot ducks in waves and as the levels go up your room for error gets less. Great game to show people new to VR as it gives the immersion effect VR is known for and a simple shooting mechanic.

Things to make this a 5 Star game. Maybe add some variety to duck animation after they get shoot. Also prevent accidental firing of gun before run fully starts. I got pretty far into the rounds and accidental fired a few bullets as I was waiting for the round to start, which caused me to fail the round and thus end my run. This could be user error, but I feel some protection could be built in to prevent this as well. Also, maybe adding different backgrounds to add some variety would help as well. 

Overall I enjoyed this game and since it seems to be a free download I think this is worth downloading and enjoying.

developer_response.body:
Hi Witwicky,
Indeed, the game is perfect for getting started with VR, feeling a bit of childhood nostalgia. Thanks for this very constructive feedback. You're right, the player shouldn't be able to shoot too early — it's a shame to lose a round because of that. I'm planning to change this in the next update, That way, you’ll be able to enjoy the game even more !

reviews.review_description: Only just got a meta quest 3 for Christmas first time ever playing VR me & the family absolutely loving it this game is amazing brings back brilliant childhood memories and for free as well what a game it’s unbelievable thank you so much for making this game puts a smile on our face every time we play it well done.

developer_response.body: THANKS ! I'm glad you like the game! It’s true that it’s ideal for getting started in VR. I will continue to develop the game because making people happy is what motivates me. I wish you and your family the best in the coming year. And welcome to VR!

reviews.review_description: I love it. It's obvious it is a game that made with love, not for profit. Replicates the original really well, can't wait to show it to my girlfriend. The only thing I miss is a left handed mode.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much Nago ! You're absolutely right — I made this game with love and a true spirit of sharing. I just want people to enjoy it and have fun. It's a lot of work for me, but the joy it brings — especially when I read comments like yours — makes it all totally worth it.

And good news for you: left-handed mode is already in! You can switch the gun to the other hand using the A and X buttons. Have fun showing it to your girlfriend! 😊

reviews.review_description: With my Quest 3 I can’t do anything but look around. The gun won’t fire to start the game.

developer_response.body:
Hi Cooidude,

I noticed your previous review and wanted to reach out. Since you last played, Virtual Duck Hunt has evolved a lot! All issues, like the occasional gun not firing, have been fixed and improvements added to make the game more fun and smoother than ever.

We’d love for you to give it another try and see the changes for yourself. If you enjoy it this time, it would mean a lot if you could consider updating your review.

Thanks so much for your time and for being part of the community!

Best,
Bifimmersive Games

reviews.review_description:
Good little fun game ✌️

Sometimes it happens you cant shoot but your weapon is full with 3 shots when you switch weapon from one hand to the other you can shot again. (Bug?) 
Please make weapon angle adjustment option weapon points too much up.

developer_response.body: Hi Max_Pain ! Thanks for the feedback ! I'll check this !

reviews.review_description: This is a perfect re-creation of this classic game that puts you into the middle of things. You actually have to be alert and look around to find the ducks. Just like in the 2d version, the ducks get faster and change direction more often as levels increase. The leader board makes the game competitive and keeps you hungry for more. Overall, a great job. Looking forward to other titles.

developer_response.body: Thanks Carlson ! This is exactly what I hoped for when creating the game. And indeed the leaderboard is really a game changer. The scores are crazy and keep evolving every day! See you soon in VR! Bifimmersive

reviews.review_description:
Imagine the classic NES Duck Hunt, remade for VR - that's pretty much exactly what this is, right down to the UI and sound effects.

What's better is that 1) VR shooting seems to work better than the light gun did, and 2) the environment is much bigger than your TV screen.

It also keeps track of your high score and integrates it with the public leaderboard.

***

Just one issue, and I'm afraid I'll have to take off a star for this until it is fixed. Sometimes in the middle of the game the gun will suddenly stop shooting, and there doesn't seem to be a way to make it work again. I don't mean I ran out of ammo; I mean that the trigger stops working. Please fix this! I like this game and hunt virtual ducks every day, but it's getting annoying when I'm approaching my high score and the game stops working :(

developer_response.body: Thank you Donuel ! Indeed, VR brings an extra layer of immersion to the original game. The leaderboard is also a great way for players to connect and keep the game vibrant. Feedback like this is what inspires me to continually improve the game. The adventure continues, I promise!

reviews.review_description: Does not work. I try to shoot a the floating cartridge but nothing happens. No shots come out of the gun.

developer_response.body:
Hi John,

I haven’t forgotten my first players like you! I noticed your previous review and wanted to reach out. Since you last played, Virtual Duck Hunt has evolved a lot! All issues, like the occasional gun not firing, have been fixed and improvements added to make the game more fun and smoother than ever.

We’d love for you to give it another try and see the changes for yourself. If you enjoy it this time, it would mean a lot if you could consider updating your review.

Thanks so much for your time and for being part of the community!

Best,
Bifimmersive Games

reviews.review_description: Decent free game if you're old enough to remember spending quarters in the arcade,  you'll probably enjoy this rendition.

developer_response.body: Indeed, I myself am old enough to have played this game a lot when I was a kid. This is what made me want to recreate the game. Thank you for your comment. Have fun !

reviews.review_description: For a free game,this is a really fun game game that takes you back to the 80's Nintendo years.

developer_response.body:
Many thanks for the review ! See you in VR ! 
Regards,
Bifimmersive

Hi Amaranth,

I haven’t forgotten my first players like you! I noticed your previous review and wanted to reach out. Since you last played, Virtual Duck Hunt has evolved a lot! Improvements have been added to make the game more fun and smoother than ever.

I’d love for you to give it another try and see the changes for yourself. If you enjoy it this time, it would mean a lot if you could consider updating your review.

Thanks so much for your time and for being part of the community!

Best,
Bifimmersive Games

reviews.review_description:
Such an addictive game. Love it so much.

Since I was a child I ALWAYS wanted to shoot that darn dog. Now I did and I felt soooo bad, poor little guy but he got up he's ok!

Can't recommend it enough. I love the "smb" bullets too. 

Oh yeah the bonus levels are excellent, can finally just go crazy shooting ducks! I like to think it's my way of getting the ones that got away.
This here is a winner!

Only downside is every once in awhile I can't shoot anymore...is it from shooting after I ran out of bullets on previous rounds? That seems to be when it happens. 

This is a must play game.

developer_response.body: Hello ! Thank you for the message. I'm very happy that you like the game. This is exactly why I recreated it. I had a good laugh at your dog story. The bonus level is the idea of ​​one of our best hunters (Kriquet). Don't hesitate to join us on the game's Discord if you have ideas or if you want to chat with other players. Concerning the ammunition problem, this happens when your left controller goes to sleep if you don't use it. Just move it to get around the problem. Sorry about that. I'm working on fixing this bug. Now is the time to submit ideas for the next update. Thanks again ! See you in VR (Bifimmersive)

reviews.review_title: Can't figure out how to start
reviews.review_description: Can someone give an old guy help on how to start the game?  Thanks

developer_response.body:
Hi Kinglou,

I haven’t forgotten my first players like you! I noticed your previous review and wanted to reach out. Since you last played, Virtual Duck Hunt has evolved a lot! All issues, like the occasional gun not firing, have been fixed and improvements added to make the game more fun and smoother than ever.

We’d love for you to give it another try and see the changes for yourself. If you enjoy it this time, it would mean a lot if you could consider updating your review.

Thanks so much for your time and for being part of the community!

Best,

reviews.review_description: Good/Fun Game, My Gun Broke Though, But It Was Still Fun.

developer_response.body: Thanks ! Have fun ! Some updates are coming... ;)

reviews.review_description:
The game is excellent! However, to enhance the overall experience, I suggest incorporating a special option for left-handed players. Additionally, I faced some difficulties in figuring out how to add ammunition. Integrating a tutorial or clearer instructions on this matter would be beneficial.

To further enrich this classic game, the idea of adding new environments is fantastic. For instance, exploring scenarios like a cemetery, a barren desert, or a tropical island with ducks in swimwear would introduce an original and entertaining touch. These additions would heighten player excitement by providing a variety of visual and thematic experiences.

developer_response.body:
An option for lefties is a good idea, I will include it in an update soon. Thanks for all these suggestions! I will take it into account.

The addition of ammunition is not planned because I respect the mechanics of the original game. At each wave of ducks, the player has 3 bullets in his rifle, no more, no less. Reloading is automatic with each new wave. You can see the number of balls remaining at any time on the left side of the summary table. Thanks again !
